                I.JumpPower = jumpPowerV
            else
                I.JumpPower = 24
            end
            return 
        end
        updateNoClipF = function(...)
            r30 = r28.Character
            task.spawn(function(...)
                mel_1 = noClipT
                e = task.wait
                while not mel_1 do
                    if e then
                        t = r30
                        I = t[3]
                        t = t[1]
                        for I, f in t, ipairs(t.GetChildren(t)) do
                            c = I
                            if f.IsA(f, "BasePart") then
                                f.CanCollide = false
                            end 
                        end
                    end
                    return 
                end
                e = task.wait(.1) 
            end)
            return 
        end
        JU[3] = 34221048299071
        JU[6] = 28912509498519
        updateInfJumpF = function(...)
            mel_8 = r26.JumpRequest
            mel_8.Connect(mel_8, function(...)
                if infJumpT and not infJumpD then
                    infJumpD = true
                    e = r28.Character
                    mel_1 = e.WaitForChild(e, "Humanoid")
                    mel_1.ChangeState(mel_1, Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
                    task.wait()
                    infJumpD = false
                end
                return 
            end)
            return 
        end
        updateFloatF = function(...)
            r31 = r28.Character
            mel_8 = r31
            r32 = mel_8.WaitForChild(mel_8, "HumanoidRootPart")
            if floatT then
                r33 = Instance.new("Part")
                r33.Name = "floatPart"
                r33.Parent = r31
                r33.Transparency = 1
                r33.Size = Vector3.new(2, .2, 1.5)
                r33.Anchored = true
                r33.CFrame = r32.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, floatY, 0)
                mel_8 = r27.Heartbeat
                floatFunc = mel_8.Connect(mel_8, function(...)
                    mel_1 = r31
                    I = mel_1.FindFirstChild(mel_1, "floatPart")
                    if I then
                        e = r32
                    end
                    if I then
                        r33.CFrame = r32.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, floatY, 0)
                    end
                    return 
                end)
            else
                mel_8 = r31
                t = mel_8.FindFirstChild(mel_8, "floatPart")
                if t then
                    mel_8 = r31
                    t = mel_8.FindFirstChild(mel_8, "floatPart")
                    t.Destroy(t)
                end
                mel_8 = floatFunc
                if mel_8 then
                    mel_8 = floatFunc
                    mel_8.Disconnect(mel_8)
                end
                return
            end 
        end
        masslessF = function(...)
            mel_1 = r28.Character
            f = mel_1.GetChildren
            c = {
                f(mel_1)
            }
            I = f[2]
            c = f[1]
            for t, mel_6 in ipairs(X(c)) do
                f = t
                if mel_6.IsA(mel_6, "BasePart") then
                    mel_6.Massless = masslessT
                end 
            end
            return 
        end

            if not I then
                return
            end

            e = t
            t = e and t.FindFirstChild(t, "Head")
            c = t and t.FindFirstChild(t, "PartOwner")
            if c then
                e = c.Value == U[JU[34]].Name
            end
            if c then
                if not I.active then
                    mel_9 = {
                        pairs(I.parts)
                    }
                    Q = pairs(I.parts)
                    mel_6 = Q(mel_9[2], mel_9[3])
                    while mel_6 do
                        mel_9 = mel_6
                        mel_9.CanCollide = false 
                    end
                    I.active = true
                end
            else
                if I.active then
                    R = "parts"
                    mel_6 = R[2]
                    Q = R[3]
                    for Q, R in pairs(I[R]) do
                        Q.CanCollide = R 
                    end
                    I.active = false
                end
                return
            end 
        end

                            if currentBlobS then

                return 
            end)
            return 
        end

        JU[125] = function(...)
            task.spawn(function(...)

                    if not U[JU[126]].Character then
                        task.wait(1)
                    end
                    mel_14 = "!@\x9a\x11\xa9"
                    mel_9 = workspace[r16[r15(mel_14, 23243651967559)]]

                    for Q, M in mel_9, pairs(mel_9.GetChildren(mel_9)) do
                        R = Q
                        mel_14 = M.PlotSign.ThisPlotsOwners
                        q = {
                            mel_14.GetChildren(mel_14)

                        m = mel_14[2]
                        mel_13 = mel_14[3]
                        for mel_13, q in pairs(X(q)) do
                            mel_14 = mel_13
                            if q.Value == U[JU[126]].Name then
                                I = workspace.PlotItems[M.Name]
                            end 
                        end 
                    end

                        task.wait(1)
                    end
                    mel_10 = nil.GetChildren
                    M = {
                        mel_10(nil)
                    }
                    Q = mel_10[1]
                    mel_9 = mel_10[2]
                    for R, M in pairs(X(M)) do
                        mel_6 = R
                        if M.IsA(M, "Model") then
                            if M.Name == "NpcRobloxianMascot" then
                                table.insert({}, M)
                            else
                                if M.Name == "NinjaShuriken" then
                                    table.insert({}, M)
                                end
                            end
                        end 
                    end
                    mel_9 = M[2]

                        mel_6 = R

                        mel_10 = r84

                            q = 1
                            q = 1

                            mel_14 = mel_13 + 1 + 8
                            a = 1

                                z = 0
                                r86 = ({})[z]
                                if not r86 then
                                    
                                else

                                    r87 = G.FindFirstChild(G, "StickyPart")
                                    if r87 then
                                        r87.CanTouch = true
                                        j = r84
                                        B = j[3]
                                        for B, j in j[1], pairs(j.GetDescendants(j)) do
                                            G = B
                                            if j.IsA(j, "BasePart") then
                                                j.CanCollide = false
                                            end 
                                        end

                                        r88.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
                                        r88.P = 10000

                                                A.CanCollide = false
                                            end 
                                        end
                                        A = r87

                                            end

                                    end

                        end

                    task.wait() 
                end

            end)

        JU[129] = function(...)
            mel_1 = U[JU[126]].Character
            I = mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart")
            mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "Humanoid")
            if not slideTPT then
                if mel_1 then
                    if I then
                        mel_8 = not e
                        c = mouse.Target and not slideTPT
                    end
                    mel_8 = not e
                    e = I
                end
                if mel_1 then
                    mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.new(mouse.Hit.x, mouse.Hit.y + 5, mouse.Hit.z)
                end
            else
                if slideTPT then
                    if not slideTPD and (slideTPT and mouse.Target) then
                        slideTPD = true
                        mel_1.Head.CanCollide = false
                        mel_1.Torso.CanCollide = false
                        e = game
                        mel_9 = e.GetService(e, "TweenService")
                        e = mel_9.Create(mel_9, mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart"), TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.In, 0, false, 0), {
                            ["CFrame"] = CFrame.new(mouse.Hit.x, mouse.Hit.y + 3, mouse.Hit.z)
                        })
                        e.Play(e)
                        e = game
                        mel_9 = e.GetService(e, "TweenService")
                        e = mel_9.Create(mel_9, cam, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.In, 0, true, 0), {
                            ["FieldOfView"] = 100
                        })
                        e.Play(e)
                        wait(.55)
                        mel_1.Head.CanCollide = true
                        mel_1.Torso.CanCollide = true
                        cam.FieldOfView = 70
                        slideTPD = false
                    end
                end
                return
            end 
        end

        JU[130] = "inspectF"
        JU[129] = function(...)
            mel_1 = U[JU[126]].Character
            mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart")
            mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "Humanoid")
            mouseTargetInspectF()
            inspectInfoF()
            if not inspectD then
                inspectD = true
                if inspectT then
                    if currentInspectS == 1 then
                        currentInspectedAdorneeS = mouse.Target.Parent
                        currentInspectedPartS = mouse.Target
                        f = highlight
                        highlightC = f.Clone(f)
                        highlightC.Adornee = mouse.Target.Parent
                        highlightC.Parent = mouse.Target
                        highlightC.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                        highlightC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(160, 11, 11)
                    else
                        if currentInspectS == 2 then
                            f = workspace.Plots
                            currentInspectedAdorneeS = f.FindFirstChild(f, "Plot" .. currentHouseInspectS)
                            currentInspectedPartS = mouse.Target
                            mel_9 = highlight
                            highlightC = mel_9.Clone(mel_9)
                            mel_10 = workspace.Plots
                            highlightC.Adornee = mel_10.FindFirstChild(mel_10, "Plot" .. currentHouseInspectS)
                            highlightC.Parent = mouse.Target
                            highlightC.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                            highlightC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 60, 180)
                        else
                            if currentInspectS == 3 then
                                currentInspectedAdorneeS = mouse.Target.Parent
                                currentInspectedPartS = mouse.Target
                                mel_10 = highlight
                                highlightC = mel_10.Clone(mel_10)
                                highlightC.Adornee = mouse.Target.Parent
                                highlightC.Parent = mouse.Target
                                highlightC.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                                highlightC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(20, 170, 20)
                            else
                                if currentInspectS == 4 then
                                    currentInspectedAdorneeS = mouse.Target.Parent
                                    currentInspectedPartS = mouse.Target
                                    mel_14 = highlight
                                    highlightC = mel_14.Clone(mel_14)
                                    highlightC.Adornee = mouse.Target.Parent
                                    highlightC.Parent = mouse.Target
                                    highlightC.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                                    highlightC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(180, 20, 180)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                else
                    if not inspectT then
                        currentInspectS = 0
                        currentHouseInspectS = 0
                        currentInspectedPartS = nil
                        currentInspectedAdorneeS = nil
                        D = highlightC
                        D.Destroy(D)
                    end
                    wait(.1)
                    inspectD = false
                end
            end
            return 
        end

        JU[130] = "inspectInfoF"
        JU[129] = function(...)
            mel_1 = U[JU[126]].Character
            mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart")
            mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "Humanoid")
            if not inspectInfoOnT and (inspectInfoT and (inspectT and (currentInspectS ~= 0 and (currentInspectedPartS ~= nil and currentInspectedAdorneeS ~= nil)))) then
                inspectInfoOnT = true
                e = billboard
                billboardC = e.Clone(e)
                billboardC.Adornee = currentInspectedAdorneeS
                billboardC.Parent = currentInspectedPartS
                e = scrollframe
                scrollframeC = e.Clone(e)
                scrollframeC.Parent = billboardC
                scrollframeC.Size = UDim2.new(0, 160, 0, 40)
                scrollframeC.ScrollBarImageTransparency = 1
                e = textlabel
                textlabelC1 = e.Clone(e)
                textlabelC1.Parent = scrollframeC
                textlabelC1.Size = UDim2.new(0, 140, 0, 40)
                if currentInspectS == 1 then
                    mel_14 = game.Players
                    textlabelC1.Text = currentInspectedAdorneeS.Name .. " (" .. mel_14.FindFirstChild(mel_14, currentInspectedAdorneeS.Name).DisplayName .. ")"
                else
                    textlabelC1.Text = currentInspectedAdorneeS.Name
                end
            else
                mel_9 = not inspectInfoT and inspectInfoOnT
                mel_8 = mel_8
                mel_8 = mel_8
                if mel_9 or not inspectT then
                    inspectInfoOnT = false
                    inspectInfoT = false
                    mel_9 = billboardC
                    mel_9.Destroy(mel_9)
                end
                return
            end 
        end

                I.CFrame = returnPosS

                    f = mouse.Target.Parent
                    mel_6 = f.IsDescendantOf(f, workspace.PlotItems)

                    if mel_6 then
                    end
                end
            end 
        end

            end
            mel_8 = mel_8

        end

                if mel_8 then
                    mel_8.PlatformStand = arg1_71
                end
            end
            return 
        end

                    mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart")
                end

        Env[JU[130]] = JU[129]
        JU[130] = "sitJumpF"
        JU[129] = function(...)
            mel_1 = U[JU[126]].Character
            mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "HumanoidRootPart")
            if not mel_1 or not mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, "Humanoid") then
                return
            end
            f = autoGucciT
            e = f
            while not f do
                if f then
                    mel_8 = blobmanInstanceS
                    if mel_8 then
                        mel_8 = blobmanInstanceS
                        f = mel_8.FindFirstChildWhichIsA(mel_8, "VehicleSeat")
                        if f then
                            e = f.Occupant ~= mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, r16[r15("\x7f\x84\x1cM.\x0e\xa9\xc8", Q)])
                        end
                        if f then
                            f.Sit(f, mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, r16[r15("\x7f\x84\x1cM.\x0e\xa9\xc8", Q)]))
                        end
                    end
                    task.wait(.1)
                    if mel_1 then
                        mel_1.WaitForChild(mel_1, r16[r15("\x7f\x84\x1cM.\x0e\xa9\xc8", Q)])
                    end
                    if mel_1 then
                        t.ChangeState(t, Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
                    end
                    task.wait(.1)
                end
                if blobmanInstanceS then
                    destroyBlobmanF()
                    break
                end
                autoGucciT = false
                sitJumpT = false
                return 
            end
            e = tick() - tick() < 6 
        end

                end
            end

        end

return (function(...)
    while true do
